summary: Mission Control Director/Coach Role Split - Complete Testing. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Both Director and Coach views verified with all required components rendering correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 503 Service Unavailable - AI service not configured/available in test environment

critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint correctly returns role-specific data: director gets programStatus/needsAttention/programActivity/programSnapshot, coach gets todays_summary/myRoster/recentActivity
Director needsAttention properly limited to max 5 items with pod_health enrichment
Coach myRoster correctly sorted by momentum (lowest first) with category badges, podHealth dots, momentum indicators
Different coaches see different roster data (Williams: 12 athletes, Garcia: different set)
Frontend properly detects role from API response and renders DirectorView or CoachView
All required data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: None - uses existing mock data from /app/backend/mock_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission Control role split fully verified. Key endpoint: GET /api/mission-control returns different data structures based on user role. Director response: {role:'director', programStatus, needsAttention (max 5), upcomingEvents, programActivity, programSnapshot}. Coach response: {role:'coach', todays_summary, myRoster, upcomingEvents, recentActivity}. Frontend: MissionControl.js detects role from API and renders DirectorView.js or CoachView.js. Director components: AIProgramBrief (dark hero), ProgramStatusRow (5 KPI pills), NeedsAttentionCard (max 5 interventions), UpcomingEventsCard, ActivityFeed. Coach components: OnboardingChecklist, TodaysActionsCard (dark hero), MyRosterCard (with momentum/category/podHealth), UpcomingEventsCard, ActivityFeed. AI endpoints return 503 in test environment (expected). Data-testids: mission-control-page, director-mission-control, coach-mission-control, ai-program-brief, ai-brief-generate, program-status-row, status-pill-*, needs-attention-card, attention-item-*, todays-actions-card, actions-generate, my-roster-card, roster-athlete-*, upcoming-events-card, activity-feed.
